title: Vitax Bonemeal, Organic Fertiliser, Slow Release, Encourages Healthy Root Development, For All Plants, Vegetables And Fruit Trees- 1.25Kg
features: SLOW-RELEASE NUTRIENTS: Vitax Bonemeal Organic Fertiliser provides a gradual release of essential nutrients, making it perfect for sustained nourishment of a wide variety of crops and plants.
PROMOTES ROOT DEVELOPMENT: Vitax Bonemeal Fertiliser encourages healthy root growth, crucial for robust plant development and overall health.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: Ideal for bulbs, herbaceous plants, shrubs, roses, fruit trees, and strawberries. This organic fetaliser can be used before sowing or planting, as a top dressing in spring, and around fruit trees and bushes in autumn.
100% ORGANIC: Made from sterilised bonemeal, offering organic nourishment while supporting environmental sustainability.
HIGH IN PHOSPHATE AND NITROGEN - Vitax Bonemeal is high in phosphate and nitrgen, essential tfor strong, healthy and disease resistent plants and flowers
